results.name: panic_assertion_failed
results.transport_error:
sdk: Exception: Command failed with exit code 1 (exit code: 1)
Error output: Check stderr output for details
results.rationale: Constructs a single-piece fmt::Arguments containing msg and forwards to core::panicking::panic_fmt with the caller location.

results.name: panic_index_out_of_bounds
results.rationale: Standard Rust panic_bounds_check: stores index/len into stack slots and calls panic_fmt with format_args!; HLIL doesn't track location through the inner call.

results.name: panic_unwrap_err
results.rationale: Standard Result::unwrap_err panic: format two &str args via panic_fmt with caller Location.

results.name: panic_overflow_sub
results.rationale: Static panic for integer-subtraction overflow; format string at 0x555557e2fbb9 confirms.

results.name: option_unit_qty_add_a
results.rationale: Resolves the merged (tag, unit) of two OptionUnitQtys per the asm comment: panics on unit mismatch when both are Some with the discriminant bit, otherwise picks the side whose qty is non-zero / not-None.
